description: Letter of appeal for help, mentioning a recent death, apparently of a husband, leaving the writer (the widow) without livelihood and unable to live with the 'dowager (al-kabira)' (her mother-in-law probably), who is demanding she move out. The lower part of the letter refers to a woman who died in the seventh month of her pregnancy. There is a gap of at least a line or two between the two fragments that comprise this document. It is conceivable that the two fragments belong to two different letters, but they are certainly by the same scribe. Join by Oded Zinger. ASE.
tags: illness: pregnancy, Illness, Appeal, pregnancy, illness letter 969-1517, death
description_he: מכתב פנייה לעזרה, מוזכרת מוות לאחרונה, כנראה של בעל, שהותיר את הכותבת (האלמנה) ללא פרנסה ואינה יכולה לגור עם חמותה הדורשת שתעבור. החלק התחתון מזכיר אשה שנפטרה בחודש השביעי להריונה.
